sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80402" key="pelago/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πελᾰγόω</orth>, <sense id="n80402.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turn into sea, flood</tr_>, Ach.
